# barracudawaf_custom_ip_blocklist (Resource)

`barracudawaf_custom_ip_blocklist` manages `Custom IP Blocklist` on the Barracuda Web Application Firewall.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "barracudawaf_custom_ip_blocklist" "test_blocklist" {
    custom_ip_list = "Download"
    download_url = "http://example.com/ips.txt"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- **custom_ip_list** (String) Custom IP List

### Optional

- **blacklisted_ips** (String) Upload File Of BlackListed IPs
- **download_url** (String) Download URL
- **trusted_certificate** (String) Trusted Certificate
- **validate_server_certificate** (String) Validate Server Certificate
